prompt: A dynamic anime idol concert illustration of a single female catgirl singer performing on a large stage, viewed from a dramatic low angle as she steps toward the camera and reaches one gloved hand forward in extreme foreshortening while holding a black microphone in the other hand. She has bright pink twin-tail hair with fluffy cat ears, orange-tinted steampunk goggles resting on her head, and red plaid ribbon bows at both sides. Her outfit is an elaborate black and red punk-idol costume with a black lace-trimmed cropped top, a red tartan frilled mini skirt, many gold chains, heart and bell charms, belts, buckles, garters, and layered accessories. Counted outfit details: 1 pair of cat ears, 1 pair of goggles, 2 hair bows, 1 fingerless glove on the reaching hand, 1 microphone, 1 cropped bustier-style top, 1 plaid skirt, 1 waist belt, 2 thigh garter systems, 1 fishnet stocking on one leg, 1 red-and-black striped thigh-high on the other leg, and 1 pair of black lace-up boots. She also has a fluffy pink cat tail visible behind her. Her expression should feel energetic, flirty, and commanding like a live pop-rock performance. The stage is packed with concert lighting trusses, purple and magenta spotlights, glowing bokeh, stairs behind her, 2 large black stage monitors in the foreground, and 3 visible venue screens showing her live image from different angles. Include 2 visible neon signs reading Neko Otome, one on a large screen in the upper left and one glowing pink on the front-right speaker, both accompanied by cute cat-face iconography. The crowd at the bottom right glows with pink light sticks. Use ultra-detailed polished anime rendering, glossy fabrics, metallic highlights, vivid pink-purple-red lighting, crisp linework, high contrast, and the high-energy atmosphere of a sold-out arena concert for Neko Otome.
